data.title: Affirm And Shopify Expand 'Buy Now, Pay Later' To Canada And UK In Global Growth Push
data.description: Affirm and Shopify accelerate global expansion of Shop Pay Installments, starting with Canada and UK this summer, with plans for Australia and Western Europe.

data.title: 'From Bad To Terrible': Treasury Secretary Slams Beijing's Retaliatory Tariffs As Trump Trade Agenda Wipes Trillions
Pfizer Stock Is Sliding Wednesday: What's Going On?
data.description: Pfizer Inc (NYSE:PFE) shares are moving lower Wednesday alongside several pharmaceutical giants after President Donald Trump indicated that tariffs on pharmaceutical companies are on the horizon.

data.title: Bitcoin's Sell-Off During Tariff Trade War: Is It No Safe Haven After All?
data.description: Bitcoin's (CRYPTO: BTC) sharp decline has sparked renewed debate: is Bitcoin truly a risk asset, or is it evolving into a safe haven?

data.title: Alibaba Cloud Bolsters AI Offerings To Competes Globally With New LLMs
data.description: Alibaba's cloud division is upgrading its AI tools for international markets. Its latest models include Qwen-Max and QwQ-Plus, rivaling US models.
